# EasyOptimizer-V attribution and license notice

The browser-side YTD inspector was implemented from the public RSC7/YTD layout
and tested against the behavior documented by
[EasyOptimizer-V](https://github.com/LN-Development/EasyOptimizer-V).

The WebAssembly texture optimization pipeline is derived from EasyOptimizer-V
and is distributed under GNU GPL version 3. EasyOptimizer-V is copyright its
contributors. The exact upstream revision, MRI wrapper source and reproducible
build instructions are provided in `web/wasm/SOURCE.md`.

The browser application preserves the original input and applies optimization
only to the new ZIP explicitly generated by the user.
